---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature for DecentraSend
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "I'm frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the specific use case where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or references here.

## Would you like to work on this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it
